objects.telescope: A brass telescope mounted on a geared pedestal. Its alignment rings can still be adjusted.
objects.console: A cracked control console with a compact keypad and a single status light.
objects.door: A round pressure door blocks the way forward. It appears linked to the console.

use.response: You adjust the rings and bring a bright point into focus. {alignment_clue}
The telescope is already aligned to the same glowing marker.
The console wakes with a chime. A prompt appears: ENTER ALIGNMENT CODE
The console remains dark. The telescope may power it if aligned.
The pressure door is unlocked. You can go to the exit_hall.
The door is sealed. The console likely controls it.

enter.response: The console confirms alignment and unlocks the pressure door with a heavy clunk.
Code rejected. The status light blinks amber.
There is nowhere to enter a code yet.
